html:
Exclusive to:

“Needs fertilization if transplanted.”

-for Monkeytails (Item)

Monkeytails are harvestable Plants exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. They can be found growing natively on Moon Quay. When harvested they produce 1 Cut Reeds. The plant can be harvested again after three days.

Unlike Reeds, they can be dug up with a shovel and transplanted to another place. The transplanted bush can be harvested 5-7 times before it must be fertilized to grow again. There is a small chance to receive new Monkeytails in their item form from the Unnatural Portal.

Monkeytails can also be used as fuel.

Gallery

  • Concept art of the Monkeytails shown in Rhymes With Play stream.
  • Monkeytails Burnt Unused

“I wonder if they're edible? Maybe an experiment is in order.”
–Wilson
“It'll look so pretty when it's on fire.”
–Willow
“Soft fuzzy plant.”
–Wolfgang
“Oh. They're so soft. And fuzzy.”
–Wendy
“IT LOOKS LIKE A PLANT AND AN ANIMAL. IT IS TWICE AS HATEFUL”
–WX-78
“A variation of the common Typha latifolia, perhaps?”
–Wickerbottom
“They're kinda like cattails except... not.”
–Woodie
“I don't trust it.”
–Maxwell
“Art thöu plants ör mönkey parts? Make up thine mind!”
–Wigfrid
“Fuzzy!”
–Webber
“I would suggest not eating those.”
–Warly
“Oh! Where you from?”
–Wormwood
“Those are some tall tails, I tell ya!”
–Winona
“How funny, a plant that apes monkeys!”
–Wortox
“Where weird plant come from?”
–Wurt
“I wonder if there's any real monkeys hiding in there?”
–Walter
“There had better not be any monkeys hiding in there.”
–Wanda
“Needs fertilization if transplanted.”
-for Monkeytails (Item)
Monkeytails are harvestable Plants exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. They can be found growing natively on Moon Quay. When harvested they produce 1 Cut Reeds. The plant can be harvested again after three days.
Unlike Reeds, they can be dug up with a shovel and transplanted to another place. The transplanted bush can be harvested 5-7 times before it must be fertilized to grow again. There is a small chance to receive new Monkeytails in their item form from the Unnatural Portal.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Đuôi Khỉ là Thực vật có thể thu hoạch độc quyền trong Don't Starve Together được giới thiệu trong bản cập nhật The Curse of Moon Quay. Chúng có thể được tìm thấy mọc tự nhiên ở Moon Quay . Khi thu hoạch chúng tạo ra 1 Lau Cắt. Cây có thể được thu hoạch lại sau ba ngày.
